personal.name: Ankit Kumar Sharma
personal.title: DevOps & Platform Architect
personal.tagline: Building scalable cloud platforms, Kubernetes ecosystems and enterprise DevOps automation systems.

summary: DevOps & Platform Architect with 13+ years of experience designing cloud infrastructure, building Kubernetes platforms and developing enterprise CI/CD automation systems. Strong expertise in AWS architecture, Infrastructure as Code using Terraform, container orchestration with Kubernetes and observability platforms using Prometheus and Grafana. Passionate about improving platform reliability, engineering productivity and system scalability through DevOps automation and modern platform engineering practices.

responsibilities: Designed Kubernetes infrastructure supporting microservices based retail applications.
Built automated CI/CD pipelines enabling rapid and reliable application deployments.
Developed reusable Terraform modules for scalable AWS infrastructure provisioning.
Implemented centralized monitoring platform using Prometheus and Grafana.
Reduced deployment time by 70% through DevOps automation.
Migrated financial application infrastructure to AWS cloud.
Built CI/CD pipelines automating build and deployment workflows.
Implemented monitoring and logging solutions for enterprise applications.
Developed automation scripts using Python and Bash.
Managed Linux infrastructure supporting enterprise workloads.
Implemented monitoring solutions improving operational visibility.
